_comment_for_humans: L3 rule to insert at position 1 via 'apply l3-insert'. Destinations are listed by GROUP NAME (not ID) so this file works against any org - the tool resolves names to that org's real IDs at apply time. The groups must already exist in the target org (create them first, e.g. with 'apply policy-bulk'). Verify they exist with 'export groups'.
